data.body: ALL 10 LEAVES CLOSED + SIGNED (ac0e,e1f2,74d9,24ec,f32e,a37b,9f25,b9c0,a8e5,d4cf). Final completion-verifier remediations were genuine + small: a8e5 needed its under-scoped ACs finished (f1fa regression fixture, backstop-vs-LLM-tier test, OA-survives-on-other-axes test, E2/F1/E6 ADR-0043 vocabulary + coach move 14) + a build-command attestation; d4cf needed the fixture-driven G7 SEMANTIC eval (plan-review-g7.eval.yaml, 3 scenarios narrowing/exceeding/contradicting — the AGENT-criterion convention like G3/G4) + a loader test + strengthened promotion-doc anchors. NEXT: rebase rewritten stack onto current origin/main, re-push to gerrit (613-617 have new content from all fixups), wait for fresh Verified+MAX + LLM+MAX on all 10, SUBMIT to land (epic AC1 requires changes landed on main), then record epic 9d50 AC2 measurement-framework comment + close epic.
